examples: The aged whiskies and musky grappa are made from local grapes like gewürztraminer, muscat and catawba.
Muscat can do luxury if you want it.
The ritziest hotel in Muscat offers a helicopter landing pad out back.
The first beer we drank was Dogfish Head's Midas Touch, an ale made with Muscat grapes.
The losers, Muscat notes, are the traditional middle- and working-class constituencies of the party.
